hintDisplay: Sujeto: tu smartphone / Verbo: cargar (acción de suministrar energía) / Complemento: durante la noche
spanishSentence: Si hubieras cargado tu smartphone durante la noche, tendría más batería ahora
correctSentence: If you had charged your smartphone during the night, it would have more battery now

hints: Complemento: sobre la ciudad ahora mismo
hintDisplay: Sujeto: el dron / Verbo: poder (habilidad) + volar / Complemento: sobre la ciudad ahora mismo

correctSentence: If the drone had had a stronger battery, it could fly over the city right now

hintDisplay: Sujeto: el sensor del dron / Verbo: volar (habilidad) / Complemento: sin batería suficiente
spanishSentence: Si hubieras cargado la batería del dron, el sensor podría volar sin problemas ahora
correctSentence: If you had charged the drone battery, the sensor could fly without problems now

hints: Complemento: la aplicación de su smartwatch

correctSentence: If they had not ignored the critical security updates, they would download the app for their smartwatch right now

hintDisplay: Sujeto: él / Verbo: escanear (acción realizada) / Complemento: documentos con su smartphone / Tiempo: ahora
spanishSentence: Si él hubiera invertido en un smartphone con sensor de cámara avanzado, estaría escaneando documentos ahora
correctSentence: If he had invested in a smartphone with advanced camera sensor, he would be scanning documents now

hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi smartwatch / Verbo: detectar (habilidad) / Complemento: cambios de ritmo cardíaco / Tiempo: ahora
spanishSentence: Si no hubiera ignorado las actualizaciones de software, mi smartwatch podría detectar cambios de ritmo cardíaco ahora
correctSentence: If I had not ignored the software updates, my smartwatch could detect heart rate changes now

hints: Verbo: capturar (acción completada en el pasado que afecta el presente)

spanishSentence: Si el sensor hubiera capturado el movimiento, la cámara no estaría desactivada ahora
correctSentence: If the sensor had captured the motion, the camera would not be disabled now

hints: Complemento: todos los partidos deportivos en tu televisor inteligente

correctSentence: If you had bought a smart TV with more storage, you would be recording all the sports matches now

correctSentence: If you had installed the motion sensor correctly, it would detect abnormal movement in the room now

hints: Complemento: una cámara de drones con sensor avanzado

correctSentence: If he had bought a drone camera with advanced sensor last year, he would have better video quality now.

hints: Complemento: su VR headset durante el fin de semana pasado

correctSentence: If she had charged her VR headset during the past weekend, she would be using it right now.

correctSentence: If they had bought a compatible smart speaker, they would turn it on now.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: tu tablet / Verbo: funcionar (capacidad/habilidad) / Complemento: sin conectarse al Wi-Fi / Tiempo: ahora

correctSentence: If you had updated the tablet software, it would not be having trouble connecting to Wi-Fi now

hintDisplay: Sujeto: tu smartphone / Verbo: no mostrar (negación) / Complemento: notificaciones en tiempo real / Tiempo: ahora mismo

correctSentence: If you had disabled push notifications yesterday, your smartphone would not be displaying real-time notifications right now.

correctSentence: If she had invested in a state-of-the-art drone last year, she would be recording professional-quality videos now.

correctSentence: If he had updated the software last year, he would be restarting his smart TV now.
